title: Add M3 medical care job slice
summary: Add patient/caregiver medical work offers and explicit treatment jobs for the focused M3 scenario.
acceptance: Medical care work offers are derived from patient condition owner state and caregiver ability/permission state
Treatment jobs are explicit serializable state machines with reservation cleanup pathing and structured interruptions
Condition changes from treatment are deterministic integer/fixed-point deltas and invalidate ability caches correctly
Failures distinguish no patient invalid condition caregiver ability path reservation permission and stale owner-state reasons
Focused tests cover treatment selection job progression cancellation condition deltas ability cache updates and no reservation leaks

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Implemented M3 medical care offers and explicit treatment jobs with reservation/path cleanup, structured reasons, integer condition deltas, ability invalidation evidence, docs/report updates; required checks pass and pnpm quality passes.

changes_requested: High: complete-time basis failures can leave reserved treatment jobs active with leaked claims; High: medical selection traverses full buckets past candidateCap; Medium: treatment terminal reasons collapse path/stale failures to invalid_condition and lose serialized failure detail.

Repaired WM-0053 changes_requested findings: complete-time basis failures now fail terminally with reservation cleanup; medical selection traversal stops at candidateCap; treatment terminal reasons persist through view/snapshot/restore; completed jobs record updated condition row version; regression tests and required checks pass.
verified: No blocking findings; prior four repair findings verified; focused Vitest, sim-core tests, taskctl validate/status, diff check, typecheck, and pnpm quality passed.

objective: Connect health/ability state to medical care behavior while preserving job and reservation boundaries.
forbiddenPaths: broad hospital economy content catalog or medicine production
mood relationship implementation beyond structured event hooks approved by ADR-0008
benchmarkImpact: Records patient offer counts caregiver candidate caps treatment outcomes condition deltas and reservation cleanup; baseline updates wait for WM-0059.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must review any medical owner-store or job-driver drift.
rollbackModel: Revert medical care code tests docs and report while preserving health/ability owner stores.
ownerGate: Keep medical work offers derived from patient owner state
Keep treatment jobs explicit and serializable
Block on save protocol schema dependency UI authority or M4 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Medical care jobs touch deterministic simulation state ownership and are outside Spark scope.

review.summary: No blocking findings; prior four repair findings verified; focused Vitest, sim-core tests, taskctl validate/status, diff check, typecheck, and pnpm quality passed.
